questionHtml: Deduce, with a reason, which stage of mitosis is shown.
markschemeHtml:
a. telophase ✔

b. chromatids/chromosomes have been pulled to the poles of the cell
OR
«2» new/daughter nuclei forming ✔

 

Do not accept cytokinesis

meta.title: Deduce, with a reason, which stage of mitosis is shown.
